headline: What if your code could export video?
HTML + CSS + Data = Real MP4
body: html-video from nexu-io turns HTML, CSS, and data into real MP4 files. Right on your laptop. No cloud service, no API costs, no rendering queues. Your code becomes a video pipeline.
image_keyword: HTML CSS to video conversion code

headline: $200-800 per video becomes $0
body: Marketing teams currently pay $200-800 per animated explainer video. html-video lets developers generate the same output programmatically for $0 per video. At scale, that is a cost reduction of 100%.

headline: 1,000 videos in the time it takes to make 1
body: A single Python script using html-video can generate 1,000 personalized videos in the time it takes a human editor to make one. Product demos, social content, data visualizations, all from the same codebase.

headline: Runs locally. No data leaves your machine.
body: The tool runs entirely locally. Your data, your templates, your output. No uploading proprietary content to a third-party rendering service. For companies in regulated industries, this is not a feature. It is a requirement.

headline: Coding agents now ship finished video products
body: Coding agents can now ship finished video products. Not just the code. The actual MP4. html-video closes the gap between code and consumable media. Agents go from writing software to producing content.

headline: The next thing your code ships might be a video. Follow for more on agent-native tools.
